/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/SigConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/SigKeyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/ECDSAEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/RSAPSSEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/BatchVerifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/ManualRSAPSS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/ModularArithmetic.cpp.o -o unit_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /home/kali/Desktop/REPORT_5_LAB/cryptopp/lib/linux/libcryptopp.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
